ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example
Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

strengths: All 7 required sections present: Meta, Purpose, Applicability, Rules, Exceptions, Checklist, Tool Integration
All 8 rules properly formatted with severity [BLOCKER/CRITICAL/WARNING] and enforcement [BLOCKED/PREVENTED/REVIEWED] labels
Rule count of 8 is within the required 5-9 range
Every rule includes concrete Bad → Good code examples showing violations and corrections
Clear boundary definitions with Security and Observability agents in related section
Specific enforcement tools named: PII Type Checker, PII Log Scanner, AI Disclosure Linter, etc.
Version 1.0 and last_updated 2026-04-09 present in YAML frontmatter
Checklist has exactly 8 items matching the 8 rules in same order
